title: Spaghetti Carbonara
steps: Cook the spaghetti according to package directions.
While the spaghetti is cooking, cut the guanciale into small pieces and cook in a large skillet over medium heat until crisp.
In a small bowl, whisk together the eggs and pecorino romano.
Once the spaghetti is cooked, drain it and add it to the skillet with the guanciale.
Remove the skillet from the heat and pour the egg and cheese mixture over the spaghetti, stirring quickly to combine.
Season with black pepper and serve immediately.

title: Chicken Tikka Masala
steps: Cut the chicken into bite-sized pieces and marinate in a mixture of yogurt, ginger-garlic paste, garam masala, turmeric, cumin, coriander, and chili powder for at least 30 minutes.
Heat oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat and cook the chicken until browned.
Add the tomato puree and cook for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Stir in the heavy cream and simmer for 10-15 minutes, or until the sauce has thickened.
Serve with rice and naan bread.
